Authors and Citation

Authors

  • María Moyano-Reina. Author.

Citation

Source: DESCRIPTION

Alonso-Epelde E, Rodés-Bachs C, Moyano-Reina M, Sampedro J, García-Muros X (2026). medusa: MEDUSA - Modelling Equity and DistribUtional impacts for Socioeconomic Analysis. R package version 0.1.0, https://github.com/bc3LC/medusa. 

@Manual{,
  title = {medusa: MEDUSA - Modelling Equity and DistribUtional impacts for Socioeconomic Analysis},
  author = {Eva Alonso-Epelde and Clàudia Rodés-Bachs and María Moyano-Reina and Jon Sampedro and Xaquín García-Muros},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 0.1.0},
  url = {https://github.com/bc3LC/medusa},
}
